data.content: Shipment note: per the parent agent's hard constraints (no push to remote, no merge to main), shipment is a local-only operation. All implementation commits are present on the worktree branch claude/elastic-clarke-9c0ed3 and tagged on this knot. The 6 K-12 commits are: 1d177b5 (internal/dotenv), 9c5739c (internal/age), 981160d (internal/store), 2fd64d8 (internal/web), 62a08c5 (internal/cli + main shrink), 8c3fc55 (TAXONOMY refresh). go build, go test, golangci-lint, and check_file_sizes.sh all pass.
